issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1190: remaining Python asset sweep 10/10

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero before BIG-GO-1190 changes, and origin/main advanced during unattended execution, so the validated commit was pushed to origin/BIG-GO-1190.

notes: This lane hardens and documents an already-complete zero-Python worktree rather than deleting additional in-branch .py files.
Go replacement paths remain bash scripts/ops/bigclawctl legacy-python compile-check --json and the broader scripts/ops/bigclawctl operator surface.
